RNA was extracted using the Qiagen RNeasy kit.
Standard Affymetrix protocols for hybridization to the Affy HGU133 2.0 plus array were used.
GeneChip Scanner was used for scanning and generating the raw .CEL files.

Bioconductor's affy package was used for RMA normalization and raw data processing using default settings for background correction and normalization. Cox regression hazards model was applied to the processed data using the survival package. All analyses were performed using R software.

Surgically isolated colorectal cancers were immediately frozen in liquid nitrogen. Total RNA was extracted from cancer tissue using Trizol reagent (Invitrogen).
Approximately 8 ug of total RNA was processed to produce biotinylated cRNA targets.
